title: T-118 — UI: Settings toggle for `require_grn_qc_inspection` (Quality section placeholder)
prompt:
# T-118 — UI: Settings toggle for `require_grn_qc_inspection` (Quality section placeholder)

## Goal
Settings UI toggle for require_grn_qc_inspection + Server Action + audit_log + i18n keys.

PO decision 2026-05-03: T-117/T-118 quality flag placeholders remain in Settings. New /settings/quality section card. Server Action wraps T-117 accessor setter. RBAC plus audit plus i18n keys. Banner notes full enforcement ships with 09-QUALITY.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/quality/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/quality/_components/RequireGrnQcToggle.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/quality/_actions/setRequireGrnQcInspection.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/quality/_components/__tests__/RequireGrnQcToggle.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/02-settings.json [edit]
- apps/web/messages/pl/02-settings.json [edit]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given the page loads with flag=false, when rendered, then the toggle is OFF and helper text + 'Coming with Quality module' banner are visible.
- Given the user toggles ON, when Save settles, then setRequireGrnQcInspection is called with true and an audit_log entry exists.
- Given a user without settings.quality.write, when on the page, then the toggle is disabled with tooltip.
- Given i18n keys are added, when 02-settings namespace test runs, then PL + EN parity holds.
- Given `pnpm vitest run` for the toggle test + namespace test, then 0 failures.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED RTL tests for default render, toggle save path, RBAC disabled, audit emission (mock).
- RED i18n parity test (re-uses T-116 namespace test).
- Run `pnpm vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/quality && pnpm vitest run apps/web/messages/__tests__/02-settings.namespace.test.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement GRN-side enforcement.
- Do not bypass withOrgContext or audit_log.
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui.
